story: Asked the prof if EBITDA stood for "Earnings Before I Tricked Dumb Analysts."
Built a Tobu prototype before class and casually demoed it in the hallway.
Summarized a 40-minute debate in one sentence and everyone nodded in silence.
Negotiated group project roles by assigning herself "CEO of vibes."
Turned a case cold call into a live product pitch for Tobu Farm.
